overall.description: First-person motorcycle gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, riding through Night City's neon-lit downtown streets at night. The player navigates wet reflective roads, passes towering skyscrapers with holographic advertisements, and stops at a traffic light before continuing through the cyberpunk metropolis.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit downtown boulevard with palm tree median

events.description: slows down while approaching first intersection with crosswalk
navigates through intersection, passing crosswalk markings

agents.ego_description: cruising down wet neon-lit boulevard on motorcycle, maintaining steady speed between 35-40 km/h

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the left side of the boulevard median
large illuminated advertisements and corporate signage on building facades
modern skyscraper with reflective glass windows and neon accents
rain-slicked multi-lane road reflecting neon lights
tall lampposts with blue-white illumination lining the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person motorcycle ride down a wide neon-lit boulevard in Night City. Palm trees line the left median while modern glass towers rise on the right. The wet asphalt reflects the vibrant neon advertisements overhead as the player maintains a steady cruising speed, approaching and navigating through an intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense commercial district with holographic advertisements

events.description: executes right turn onto winding street with tighter building corridors
enters denser commercial area with larger digital billboards and overpasses

agents.ego_description: navigating turns through narrow city streets, weaving between buildings and passing under overpasses

notable_agents.action: sedan driving ahead in same direction, maintaining distance

entered.detail: elevated highway or monorail structure crossing above the street
massive illuminated screens displaying advertisements on building sides
dense urban structures with neon signage and industrial details
suspended traffic signals over the intersection ahead

segments.scene_description: The player turns right into a narrower commercial corridor, leaving the palm-lined boulevard behind. The street winds between dense cyberpunk architecture with massive digital billboards and overhead infrastructure. A sedan drives ahead as the player navigates the wet, reflective streets, passing under an overpass and approaching a major intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: major downtown intersection with traffic control

events.description: comes to complete stop at red traffic light behind sedan
cross traffic passes through intersection while waiting at light

agents.ego_description: stopped at red light behind a sedan, engine idling while waiting for signal to change

notable_agents.action: silver sedan stopped directly ahead at traffic light

entered.detail: yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings
overhead traffic signal gantry displaying red light
large floating holographic display projecting product advertisements

segments.scene_description: The player stops at a major downtown intersection, waiting behind a sedan at a red traffic light. The wide intersection features prominent crosswalks and is surrounded by towering buildings with holographic advertisements. Cross traffic moves through the intersection while the player remains stationary, observing the neon-lit urban environment.

events.description: accelerates from stop as traffic light turns green
executes right turn at intersection onto new street

agents.ego_description: accelerating from traffic light and making right turn onto new street, resuming cruise speed

notable_agents.action: cross traffic vehicle passing through intersection from left

entered.detail: fresh stretch of road with different building architecture and signage
commercial structures at the intersection corner with ground-level shops

segments.scene_description: As the light turns green, the player accelerates away from the intersection and executes a right turn onto a new downtown street. The motorcycle leaves the major intersection behind, entering a corridor lined with corner commercial buildings and fresh neon signage. The wet road continues to reflect the vibrant city lights as the player resumes cruising speed.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person motorcycle ride that transitions from a wide, open boulevard into a dense, claustrophobic commercial corridor. It begins by cruising down a broad neon-lit avenue, passing palm trees on the left and towering glass skyscrapers on the right while the wet asphalt reflects the vibrant glow of overhead advertisements. As the rider navigates through an intersection, the camera turns right, leaving the open boulevard behind to enter a narrower street. The scene then shifts into a winding path flanked by dense cyberpunk architecture and massive digital billboards, passing under a heavy overpass while following a sedan. Finally, the movement continues through the reflective streets of the urban canyon toward another major intersection.

The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective that transitions from a stationary wait at a bustling city intersection to a fluid ride through a neon-lit urban corridor. It begins with the camera held still behind a sedan at a red traffic light, surrounded by towering skyscrapers and shimmering holographic advertisements. As the light turns green, the motorcycle accelerates forward and executes a smooth right turn, leaving the wide intersection behind. The scene then shifts into a narrower street lined with commercial buildings and vibrant signage, where the wet pavement reflects the glowing city lights. The camera continues to glide forward, resuming a cruising speed as it penetrates deeper into the cyberpunk metropolis.
